postmark.Subject: Re: Purchase — David Okafor
postmark.TextBody:
Correction — this is actually a refinance, not a purchase. Borrower owns the property; refinancing existing first with TD Canada Trust (balance $285k per attached payout statement). Sorry for the initial framing — should have caught it before sending.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
